citation: Zhao J et al., Briefings in Bioinformatics 2023, bbad025, doi:10.1093/bib/bbad025. Table 1 reports −log10(log-rank P) and number of significant clinical variables (of six).
note: The SNF row below matches the manuscript values used in docs/SESSION_HANDOFF.md §七. For Subtype-DCC (proposed method) and K-means / Spectral / NMF baseline rows, transcribe the corresponding cells from your copy of Table 1 into the empty objects (same per-cancer format as snf: [neg_log10_logrank_p, n_significant_clinical]). Until filled, table1_compare_to_paper.py will list reproduction metrics and mark paper cells as unavailable.
